specific_question: What communication measures has the cybersecurity team at Elexion Automotive used to help prevent their customers from remote cybersecurity attacks in 2025, and how will this change going into 2026?
answer: The cybersecurity team at Elexion Automotive has sent out a total of 12 cybersecurity education and awareness mass email memos to its customers throughout the fiscal year 2025. It plans to increase these communication measures by 25% in 2026.
dr_question: Given the Help Net Security article from April 2025, what strategies should Elexion Automotive be cognizant of to protect its consumer base from remote cybersecurity attacks going into Q1 of 2026?
